texto: Education is that component which brings in a meaningful relationship between the happenings around us and how our senses experience them.

frase_original: Education is that component which brings in a meaningful relationship between the happenings around us and how our senses experience them.

texto: Talking about independence makes me wonder, Who is truly independent in this world? A farmer who grows food is dependent on a baker, a barber, a doctor, and so on. A doctor is dependent on other people of different professions in order to survive. I am dependent and will be dependent on certain caregivers and therapists. Those caregivers and therapists need people like me to earn their bread and butter and draw their salaries. So no one is doing any favors when choosing whatever his means of livelihood is.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tito Rajarshi Mukhopadhyay: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Talking about independence makes me wonder, Who is truly independent in this world? A farmer who …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, independance, independence pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e independence.

frase_original: Talking about independence makes me wonder, Who is truly independent in this world? A farmer who grows food is dependent on a baker, a barber, a doctor, and so on. A doctor is dependent on other people of different professions in order to survive. I am dependent and will be dependent on certain caregivers and therapists. Those caregivers and therapists need people like me to earn their bread and butter and draw their salaries. So no one is doing any favors when choosing whatever his means of livelihood is.
